# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.263 — Reimbursement Fee for Impoundment

The court shall impose against the defendant a reimbursement fee of $15 a day for each day of impoundment of the defendant’s vehicle.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B.346), Sec. 2.74, eff. January 1, 2020.*

subsections.text: The court shall impose against the defendant a reimbursement fee of $15 a day for each day of impoundment of the defendant’s vehicle.
